note: Curated market observations. Each item is summarized; items with a date and a condition are tracked as verifiable calls. Replace with live curation before production.

items.summary: BOJ's JGB holdings shrink ¥30–40T a year as ¥50–60T matures against ~¥24T of annual buying. On that path the balance sheet contracts to ¥350–370T by Mar 2030 (−36–39%).
Policy rate raised 0.75% → 1.00% on a 7–1 vote. Bond-purchase tapering halts after Apr 2027, holding ~¥2T a month. Market reaction muted.
A regional bank with two straight years of FX-unhedged bond gains starts buying JGBs and super-long bonds — its first move in a decade. Read as a signal.
